metadata.title: Related commercial and sales-gated platforms
metadata.description: Related event-networking, speed-networking, golf scheduling, coffee-chat, and matchmaking platforms that are not part of the ranked Awesome Group Generators dataset because a self-serve group-generation workflow was not publicly verifiable, the product is primarily sales-gated, or the fit is adjacent rather than a classical group generator.
metadata.ratingPolicy: These entries are intentionally not star-rated and must not be merged into data/tools.json unless a publicly testable generator, open demo, or runnable implementation is reviewed. Entries promoted after live review are removed from this related-only file.

platforms.name: Who's on the Tee?
platforms.whyNotRanked: Public page describes a golf society tee-sheet product, but no self-serve generator workflow was verified.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims pasted players, rules, fair groups, handicap spreading, and repeat avoidance for golf societies.
platforms.notes: Potentially relevant to social-golfer-style scheduling if a testable demo becomes available.

platforms.name: Teams.Golf
platforms.whyNotRanked: Product page describes automated golf team generation, but the generator was not publicly tested.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims automated team generation based on group handicaps and match-up algorithms.
platforms.notes: Likely relevant to golf-team balancing, not a normal paste-and-generate web tool.

platforms.name: Golf Team - Generator App
platforms.whyNotRanked: Native app listing only; no live app workflow was tested.
platforms.publicEvidence: App Store listing claims fair and balanced teams from golfers and handicap/average score.
platforms.notes: Could be reviewed separately with device/app testing.

platforms.name: Probable Golf Optimized Golf Group Generator
platforms.whyNotRanked: Marketing/information page for an optimized golf grouping product; no public generator was verified.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims optimized group combinations that reduce repeat pairings.
platforms.notes: Relevant to social-golfer scheduling, but not directly comparable without a testable tool.

platforms.name: SpeedMatchApp
platforms.whyNotRanked: Commercial matchmaking/event platform; no open generator workflow was verified.
platforms.publicEvidence: Markets speed dating, speed networking, speed mentoring, and event matchmaking.
platforms.notes: Relevant as a commercial platform if users need full event operations.

platforms.name: PairConnex Roundtable / B2B Express
platforms.whyNotRanked: Sales-oriented commercial platform; no independently testable generator was reviewed.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims algorithmic meeting generation with matchmaking rules and constraints.
platforms.notes: Strong conceptual fit for speed-networking rotations, but not comparable without access.

platforms.name: NetWorks Events
platforms.whyNotRanked: Commercial platform with no public self-serve generator review.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims intelligent matching, walk-in speed networking, and structured connection sessions.
platforms.notes: Related to speed networking rather than simple group generation.

platforms.name: SpeedNetworking.com
platforms.whyNotRanked: Commercial virtual/in-person speed-networking platform; no public generator was tested.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims targeted matching algorithms and one-on-one meeting workflows.
platforms.notes: Track as related enterprise/event software.

platforms.name: MixerSeater
platforms.whyNotRanked: Commercial platform with setup and registration workflow; no open generator output was reviewed.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims seating rotation planning, participant upload, preferences, table/room parameters, and printable agendas.
platforms.notes: Strongly related to multi-round table rotations.

platforms.name: PerfectTablePlan Speed Networking Seating Rotation Generator
platforms.whyNotRanked: Commercial desktop/product page; no public generator flow was reviewed.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims generation of multiple seating arrangements with no repeated table companions.
platforms.notes: Relevant to seating/table rotation, not a normal web generator.

platforms.name: Fanciful
platforms.whyNotRanked: Event management platform rather than a verified public group generator.
platforms.publicEvidence: Markets speed dating event management software.
platforms.notes: Adjacent if dating rotations are treated as networking schedules.

platforms.name: Chati Speed Networking
platforms.whyNotRanked: Feature page for a commercial event platform; no public generator was tested.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims virtual speed networking, session time limits, notes, and ratings.
platforms.notes: Related event-platform feature.

platforms.name: Apps4Meetings Speed Networking
platforms.category: speed networking / hosted buyer / peer matching
platforms.whyNotRanked: Commercial platform page; no public self-serve generator workflow was reviewed.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims speed networking, hosted buyer, peer-to-peer matches, mentor matches, and reports.
platforms.notes: Related to event matchmaking, not a ranked generator.

platforms.name: Leet
platforms.whyNotRanked: Broader AI session-building product; not a classical group generator and no generator workflow was reviewed.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims AI-built speed networking structures and matching logic from natural-language prompts.
platforms.notes: Adjacent to event design rather than directly comparable.

platforms.name: Brella Event Matchmaking
platforms.whyNotRanked: Enterprise event matchmaking platform; no public generator workflow was tested.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims AI-powered attendee/sponsor matchmaking and smart networking.
platforms.notes: Related B2B/event matchmaking platform.

platforms.name: Eventdex Business Matchmaking App
platforms.whyNotRanked: Commercial hosted-buyer/event platform; not publicly reviewed as a generator.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims AI-powered B2B matchmaking and meeting scheduling.
platforms.notes: Related, but outside the self-serve generator dataset.

platforms.name: b2match Event Matchmaking
platforms.whyNotRanked: All-in-one commercial event platform; no public generator workflow was reviewed.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims participant profiles, agendas, networking filters, and one-on-one meeting setup.
platforms.notes: Related event matchmaking product.

platforms.name: vFairs AI Event Matchmaking
platforms.whyNotRanked: Commercial event platform feature page; no public generator was tested.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims organizer-controlled AI matching criteria for attendee/exhibitor connections.
platforms.notes: Related matchmaking platform.

platforms.name: Gevme Business Matchmaking Software
platforms.whyNotRanked: Commercial business matching engine; no public generator workflow was reviewed.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims AI-powered matching based on predefined criteria.
platforms.notes: Related event platform, not a public group generator.

platforms.name: Grip Event Matchmaking / MustMeet
platforms.whyNotRanked: Commercial platform; public pages describe matching but do not expose a self-serve generator for review.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims AI event matchmaking and pre-scheduled meetings for structured events.
platforms.notes: Related to hosted-buyer and B2B meeting scheduling.

platforms.name: Map D AI Business Matchmaking
platforms.whyNotRanked: Commercial event software feature; no public generator workflow was reviewed.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims AI attendee/exhibitor profile matching and qualified meetings.
platforms.notes: Related but sales/platform oriented.

platforms.name: Deal Room Event Matchmaking
platforms.whyNotRanked: Commercial matchmaking platform; no self-serve generator was reviewed.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims AI meeting recommendations, table/area assignment, group networking, and roundtables.
platforms.notes: Related B2B/event matching platform.

platforms.name: Eventtia B2B Matchmaking and Networking
platforms.whyNotRanked: Commercial event networking platform; no public generator workflow was reviewed.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims participant profiles, personalized agendas, networking filters, and one-on-one meetings.
platforms.notes: Related event platform.

platforms.name: b.square
platforms.whyNotRanked: Commercial meeting-management platform; no public generator was tested.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims an optimization algorithm for one-to-one meeting schedules based on requests and availability.
platforms.notes: Relevant to event meeting scheduling but not a self-serve group generator.

platforms.name: Bizzabo Event Networking
platforms.whyNotRanked: Commercial event platform; no public generator workflow was reviewed.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims AI-enhanced event networking, matchmaking, and scheduling.
platforms.notes: Related platform only.

platforms.name: Accelevents Hosted Buyer Software
platforms.whyNotRanked: Commercial hosted-buyer product; no public generator was reviewed.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims AI matchmaking and meeting scheduling for buyer/seller events.
platforms.notes: Related B2B scheduling platform.

platforms.name: Exponaut Matchmaking
platforms.whyNotRanked: Commercial B2B networking product; no public generator workflow was reviewed.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims pre-made attendee accounts, matching, chat, and collaboration workflows.
platforms.notes: Related event networking platform.

platforms.name: RapidSync
platforms.whyNotRanked: Commercial networking platform; no self-serve grouping or matching workflow was reviewed.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims AI-powered conference networking, real-time chat, and meeting booking.
platforms.notes: Related but not a ranked generator.

platforms.name: MyExpoPro Match & Meet App
platforms.whyNotRanked: Commercial B2B matchmaking platform; no public generator workflow was reviewed.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims visitor/exhibitor match-and-meet portal for event leads.
platforms.notes: Related event product.

platforms.name: Animo Meeting Marketplace
platforms.whyNotRanked: Commercial meeting marketplace; no public generator was reviewed.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims attendee/partner meeting marketplace setup and exhibitor ROI workflows.
platforms.notes: Related B2B event platform.

platforms.name: TeaTime.Chat
platforms.whyNotRanked: Slack coffee-chat product, adjacent to recurring pair generation but not a classical group generator.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims automated Slack coffee-chat pairing with frequency setup and conversation starters.
platforms.notes: Could be relevant if the dataset scope expands to recurring workplace pairings.

platforms.name: RandomCoffee
platforms.whyNotRanked: Commercial employee engagement/matching platform; adjacent to grouping but not directly comparable.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims automated matching programs and customizable algorithms for employee connections.
platforms.notes: Track as related recurring matching software.

platforms.name: CoffeeChats.ai
platforms.whyNotRanked: Commercial/hosted coffee-chat matching product; no public generator workflow was reviewed.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims AI-matched 1:1 member introductions via Slack or email.
platforms.notes: Adjacent to speed networking/recurring pairing.

platforms.name: Lunch Roulette
platforms.whyNotRanked: Slack app/product page; no public grouping workflow was reviewed and scope is adjacent.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims weekly/monthly random team-member connections.
platforms.notes: Related workplace pairing product.

platforms.name: Coffee Roulette
platforms.whyNotRanked: Commercial employee coffee-matching product; no public generator workflow was reviewed.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims employee coffee matching based on days in common and more than one million matches.
platforms.notes: Adjacent recurring pair scheduler.

platforms.name: Random Meets
platforms.whyNotRanked: Commercial/hosted random meeting product; adjacent and not tested as a generator.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims weekly paired video calls within a group.
platforms.notes: Related workplace/community pairing product.

platforms.name: CoffeeRoulette by Made With Love
platforms.whyNotRanked: Slack command workflow for random Zoom coffee spots; adjacent and not a normal group generator.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims a /coffeeroulette slash command for random colleagues joining Zoom calls.
platforms.notes: Related but narrow Slack/Zoom workflow.

platforms.name: Alfy Coffee & Donut Chat
platforms.whyNotRanked: Commercial Slack HR bot; adjacent to recurring pair matching rather than group generation.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims Slack coffee matching for team bonding.
platforms.notes: Related workplace pairing product.

platforms.name: Donut Virtual Coffee Program
platforms.whyNotRanked: Commercial Slack intro program; adjacent and not a public group-generator workflow.
platforms.publicEvidence: Claims recurring Donut channels for virtual coffees and groups of two.
platforms.notes: Related recurring pairing platform.

platforms.name: RoundBoss
platforms.whyNotRanked: Public page is a hosted golf league and simulator-league platform; matchup/team generation is part of the platform rather than a public paste-and-generate tool.
platforms.publicEvidence: Browser review found manager/solo login and signup flows, pricing, docs, no-app/no-player-signup claims, scoring/handicap/rankings, and league-management automation.
platforms.notes: Promote only if a public self-serve matchup/team generator can be reviewed without platform setup.

platforms.name: GolfSoftware Tournament Manager
platforms.whyNotRanked: Commercial golf league/club/tournament software product page; no public generator workflow comparable to ranked tools was available.
platforms.publicEvidence: Public page describes League Manager and Club Manager with event pairings, schedules, team standings, flights/divisions, scorecards, tournament management, and handicap-oriented workflows.
platforms.notes: Same vendor has a small public Play All Schedule Generator ranked separately; this record tracks the broader commercial product.

platforms.name: Match M8
platforms.category: mobile skill-rating and balanced matchup app
platforms.whyNotRanked: App Store-only iPhone app; no installed app workflow was tested.
platforms.publicEvidence: Listing describes Elo-style ratings, balanced matchmaking, generated teams, saved teams, match history, leaderboard, and predicted win percentages.
platforms.notes: Relevant to balanced pickup/sports matching if mobile apps are tested later.

platforms.name: Coach formação
platforms.category: mobile football/futsal formation and team generator
platforms.whyNotRanked: App Store-only iOS/iPadOS app; no installed app workflow was tested.
platforms.publicEvidence: Listing describes players with positions and skill levels, team-size selection, balanced team generation, together groups, rival pairs, drag-to-field adjustment, image sharing, offline data, and Pro options.
platforms.notes: Relevant to sports-team formation if native app reviews are added.

platforms.name: FairDealPro
platforms.category: Android sports team management and balancing app
platforms.whyNotRanked: Google Play app listing only; no installed app workflow was tested.
platforms.publicEvidence: Listing describes intelligent team generation, skill dimensions such as technique/speed/physics/statistics/scoring, event management, registration/reserve lists, player database, ranking system, admin tools, and reports.
platforms.notes: Relevant for sports organizers; promote only after app testing or a public web workflow.

platforms.name: JOGO
platforms.category: sports challenge / ELO / team and tournament platform
platforms.whyNotRanked: Public page is a beta sports platform with login/signup and app-store download flows; no self-serve team generator output was tested.
platforms.publicEvidence: Browser review found ELO, court discovery, challenges, rankings, build teams, run tournaments, App Store/Google Play links, Supabase-backed signup/login, and beta positioning.
platforms.notes: Related sports-platform ecosystem rather than a ranked generator for now.

platforms.name: Random Generator - Spin Wheel
platforms.category: iOS random utility with team generator
platforms.whyNotRanked: App Store-only iOS/iPadOS app; no installed workflow was tested.
platforms.publicEvidence: Listing describes a team generator with weighting, gender balance options, skill levels, separated people, iCloud sync/groups, widgets, Siri shortcuts, pair generator, matching, and many other random tools.
platforms.notes: Relevant app-only random/team generator; review with device/app testing if ranked app coverage expands.

platforms.name: Team Picker by Lynx Magnus
platforms.whyNotRanked: Google Play app listing only; no installed app workflow was tested.
platforms.publicEvidence: Listing describes 2–8 balanced teams, saved players, goalkeeper separation, random mode, saved generations, scores, sharing, 10K+ downloads, and ads/data-safety details.
platforms.notes: Candidate was found via APKGK, then verified on the official Google Play listing.

platforms.name: Team Maker - Random Squads
platforms.whyNotRanked: App Store-only iOS/iPadOS app; no installed app workflow was tested.
platforms.publicEvidence: App Store listing describes a soccer/football team generator for balanced random teams; MWM intelligence page also summarizes balanced team generation.
platforms.notes: Low-rated/old app, but relevant enough to track as app-only.

platforms.name: Random Team Generator by L&H Applications
platforms.whyNotRanked: Google Play listing only; no installed app workflow was tested.
platforms.publicEvidence: Listing describes a 100K+ download Android app. Current notes mention tournaments, keep-together/keep-apart rules, hidden player levels, adjustable team names/colors, fairness display, and team leads.
platforms.notes: Relevant enough for related app tracking; promote only after app testing.

platforms.name: voll-e Pickup Team Generator
platforms.whyNotRanked: App Store-only app; no installed workflow was tested.
platforms.publicEvidence: Listing describes saved regular players/groups, skill-balanced team generation, fast sessions, editable team names, swaps, rerolls, and team-average display.
platforms.notes: Relevant sports app if native app reviews are added.

platforms.name: AutoRoster
platforms.whyNotRanked: Paid App Store-only iPhone app; no installed workflow was tested.
platforms.publicEvidence: Listing describes custom player ratings, optional positions/roles, smart balancing, two or three teams, local-only/no-account/no-ads/no-tracking claims.
platforms.notes: Track as app-only balanced-practice tool.

platforms.name: Random Team Generator - Splitr
platforms.whyNotRanked: App Store-only iOS/iPadOS app; no installed workflow was tested.
platforms.publicEvidence: Listing describes paste/add names, split by team count or team size, odd-player handling, saved rosters/history/share, premium skill balancing, and captain mode.
platforms.notes: Track as app-only random/team generator.

platforms.name: Team Balancer by pashooo
platforms.whyNotRanked: Google Play app listing only; no installed workflow was tested.
platforms.publicEvidence: Listing describes player groups, skill ratings, smart algorithm for balanced teams, soccer/pickup use, ratings profiles, and detailed result views.
platforms.notes: Track as app-only sports balancer.

platforms.name: Lil' Soccer: Team maker
platforms.whyNotRanked: Google Play app listing only; no installed workflow was tested.
platforms.publicEvidence: Listing describes random soccer/football team generation with skill levels, goalkeeper distribution, chosen team count, 50K+ downloads, and ads.
platforms.notes: Track as app-only soccer balancer.

platforms.name: Rastgele Takım Oluşturucu PRO / Make Teams PRO
platforms.category: Android random balanced team generator app
platforms.whyNotRanked: Google Play app listing only; no installed workflow was tested.
platforms.publicEvidence: Listing describes saved player lists, text-file import, voice input, skill levels, unlimited team generation, sharing via WhatsApp/email, and Turkish/localized UI.
platforms.notes: Track as app-only Turkish Make Teams PRO app.

platforms.name: SCHABI / Schule am Bildschirm
platforms.category: Swiss classroom platform with group generator
platforms.whyNotRanked: SCHABI is a broader Swiss classroom/teaching platform; the group generator is one platform feature, not a public standalone generator workflow.
platforms.publicEvidence: educa.ch listing describes classroom pages, tasks, AI services, and tools including a Gruppengenerator/random grouping with constraints; links to SCHABI information pages.
platforms.notes: Related classroom platform; rank only if a public self-serve group generator is reviewed.

platforms.name: FutZone
platforms.whyNotRanked: Public site is primarily a landing page for mobile apps; no standalone web generator workflow was available to rank.
platforms.publicEvidence: Browser review found app-store links and claims for player spaces, 1–5 skill levels, goalkeeper flags, 250-team-combination balancing, tactical view, and sharing.
platforms.notes: Relevant sports app/platform; promote only after app testing or a public web generator is added.

platforms.name: Sorteia Times Equilibrados
platforms.category: Android balanced sports-team app landing page
platforms.whyNotRanked: Static landing page for an Android app; no live web generator was available to rank.
platforms.publicEvidence: Page describes random and balanced team creation based on player evaluations and links to Google Play id=com.tfhlsolutions.sorteioesportivo.
platforms.notes: Track as app-only sports-team balancer.
